title: helianthemum guttatum subsp. eriocaulon
intro: Helianthemum guttatum subsp. eriocaulon, also known as rockrose, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The rockrose plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and relief from coughs and colds. Rockrose can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, or applied topically in the form of creams or salves, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
